revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Hiroshige |title = [[Hiroshige]] |state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} |bodyclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Woodblock prints |list1 = *''[[Sudden Shower over Shin-Ōhashi Bridge and Atake]]'' (1857) *''[[Plum Park in Kameido]]'' (1857)
|group2 = Series |list2 = *''[[The Fifty-three Stations of the Tōkaidō]]'' (1833–34) *''[[The Sixty-nine Stations of the Kiso Kaidō]]'' (1834–1842) *''[[Famous Views of the Sixty-odd Provinces]]'' (1853–1856) *''[[One Hundred Famous Views of Edo]]'' (1856–1858) *''[[Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji (Hiroshige)|Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji]]'' (1859)
|group3 = Related |list3 = *''[[Eight Views of Ōmi]]''
|below = {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:Works by Hiroshige|Category]]
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Hiroshige}} [[Category:Japanese artist navigational boxes]] [[Category:Artist (painter) navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Hiroshige |title = [[Hiroshige]] |state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} |bodyclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Woodblock prints |list1 = *''[[:en:Sudden Shower over Shin-Ōhashi Bridge and Atake|Sudden Shower over Shin-Ōhashi Bridge and Atake]]'' (1857) *''[[:en:Plum Park in Kameido|Plum Park in Kameido]]'' (1857)
|group2 = Series |list2 = *''[[:en:The Fifty-three Stations of the Tōkaidō|The Fifty-three Stations of the Tōkaidō]]'' (1833–34) *''[[:en:The Sixty-nine Stations of the Kiso Kaidō|The Sixty-nine Stations of the Kiso Kaidō]]'' (1834–1842) *''[[:en:Famous Views of the Sixty-odd Provinces|Famous Views of the Sixty-odd Provinces]]'' (1853–1856) *''[[:en:One Hundred Famous Views of Edo|One Hundred Famous Views of Edo]]'' (1856–1858) *''[[:en:Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji (Hiroshige)|Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji]]'' (1859)
|group3 = Related |list3 = *''[[:en:Eight Views of Ōmi|Eight Views of Ōmi]]''
|below = {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:Works by Hiroshige|Category]]
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
</noinclude>

}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox |name = Hiroshige |title = [[Hiroshige]] |state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} |bodyclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Woodblock prints |list1 = *''[[:en:Sudden Shower over Shin-Ōhashi Bridge and Atake|Sudden Shower over Shin-Ōhashi Bridge and Atake]]'' (1857) *''[[:en:Plum Park in Kameido|Plum Park in Kameido]]'' (1857)
|group2 = Series |list2 = *''[[:en:The Fifty-three Stations of the Tōkaidō|The Fifty-three Stations of the Tōkaidō]]'' (1833–34) *''[[:en:The Sixty-nine Stations of the Kiso Kaidō|The Sixty-nine Stations of the Kiso Kaidō]]'' (1834–1842) *''[[:en:Famous Views of the Sixty-odd Provinces|Famous Views of the Sixty-odd Provinces]]'' (1853–1856) *''[[:en:One Hundred Famous Views of Edo|One Hundred Famous Views of Edo]]'' (1856–1858) *''[[:en:Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji (Hiroshige)|Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji]]'' (1859)
|group3 = Related |list3 = *''[[:en:Eight Views of Ōmi|Eight Views of Ōmi]]''
|below = {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:Works by Hiroshige|Category]]
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Monkbot]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hiroshige here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hiroshige for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox |name = Hiroshige |title = [[Hiroshige]] |state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} |bodyclass = hlist |image =
|group1 = Woodblock prints |list1 = *''[[:en:Sudden Shower over Shin-Ōhashi Bridge and Atake|Sudden Shower over Shin-Ōhashi Bridge and Atake]]'' (1857) *''[[:en:Plum Park in Kameido|Plum Park in Kameido]]'' (1857)
|group2 = Series |list2 = *''[[:en:The Fifty-three Stations of the Tōkaidō|The Fifty-three Stations of the Tōkaidō]]'' (1833–34) *''[[:en:The Sixty-nine Stations of the Kiso Kaidō|The Sixty-nine Stations of the Kiso Kaidō]]'' (1834–1842) *''[[:en:Famous Views of the Sixty-odd Provinces|Famous Views of the Sixty-odd Provinces]]'' (1853–1856) *''[[:en:One Hundred Famous Views of Edo|One Hundred Famous Views of Edo]]'' (1856–1858) *''[[:en:Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji (Hiroshige)|Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji]]'' (1859)
|group3 = Related |list3 = *''[[:en:Eight Views of Ōmi|Eight Views of Ōmi]]''
